speaker: speaker1
text: Ella , it's been such a long week . I'm ready to go out and party . Hey , let's go out for a night on the town .

speaker: speaker2
text: Gosh , you took all the word right out of my mouth . Let's go out and get crazy tonight .

speaker: speaker1
text: Let's go to the new club on West Street .

speaker: speaker2
text: Sure , but what do I wear ?

speaker: speaker1
text: You can wear that pretty red dress .
